notes: Budgets are sized for the GitHub Actions ubuntu-24.04 hosted runner.
Local laptop runs typically beat these by 30-50% — the budget tracks
what a regression would visibly cross on the real CI hardware.
Initial baseline observed (worst of 2 retries per route):
Headroom: ~300ms above worst observed, rounded up to the nearest 100ms.
To rebaseline, run perf:lighthouse on a CI-equivalent runner, take the
worst value across three runs, add 300ms, round up.
CLS is fixed at 0.1 (the Web Vitals 'good' threshold) on every route.
